summary: Static code review of the valor_adicional/descuento_contrato persistence fix. All 4 verification points PASS. PreliminaryContractForm.tsx correctly persists the 4 new fields (valor_adicional, descuento_contrato, tarifa_diaria, dias_contrato) on insert at lines 815-818. ConvertToFinalDialog.tsx interface declares them (lines 52-55), and both handlePreview (lines 183-186) and handleConvert (lines 497-500) read them directly from preliminaryContract using `?? 0` fallback instead of reverse-engineering from total_amount. Logic is symmetric between preview and convert, so preview PDF and final PDF will match.
action_items: USER ACTION REQUIRED: Ensure the ALTER TABLE SQL adding columns valor_adicional, descuento_contrato, tarifa_diaria, dias_contrato has been executed on Supabase contracts table. Without this, the insert at PreliminaryContractForm.tsx:815-818 will fail with a schema error.

Recommended runtime smoke test: Create a preliminary contract with additionalValue > 0 and discount > 0, verify DB row contains the 4 fields populated, then convert to final and verify preview/final totals match the preliminary PDF.
critical_code_review_comments: Fallback chain in handlePreview/handleConvert uses `preliminaryContract.tarifa_diaria || reservationFinancials?.tarifa_diaria || vehicleData?.tarifa_dia_iva || 0` — the `||` operator will fall through if tarifa_diaria is 0. This is acceptable since 0 daily rate is nonsensical, but consider `??` for consistency with valor_adicional/descuento (which correctly use `??`).
PreliminaryContractForm.tsx is 1600 lines — exceeds 700 line guideline. Recommend splitting into sub-components in a future refactor.
Line 568 and 632 also reference valor_adicional in the same file (for PDF generation / other flows) — verified those are consistent with the insert value.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fix verified via static analysis only. Runtime testing skipped since it requires Supabase auth + ALTER TABLE migration executed by user. Prior iterations (1: overlap logic, 2: cancel dialog) already passed. Data flow: PreliminaryContractForm.onSubmit persists 4 fields -> ConvertToFinalDialog reads directly via preliminaryContract.<field> with ?? 0 fallback -> same values used in both PDF preview and final conversion.
